revision.comment: Auto-generated page
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> Thi...'
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template displays links which are generated based on a page's base page name. These are useful for templates which work using a Lua module of the same name. The first unnamed parameter or {{para|1}} can be used to add more information; {{tlx|Sidebar|2=child=yes}} can be used inside it for further customization. The default links use {{tl|Div col}} and the plainlist CSS class. == Usage == * Without any extra links: {{Lua sidebar}} * With an extra unbulleted list: {{Lua sidebar|{{ubl|List item 1|List item 2}}}} {{sandbox other|| }}

revision.comment: ce
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template displays links which are generated based on a page's base page name. These are useful for templates which work using a Lua module of the same name. The parameter {{para|title}} can be used to add the title of the template and module. The first unnamed parameter or {{para|1}} can be used to add more information; {{tlx|Sidebar|2=child=yes}} can be used inside it for further customization. The default links use {{tl|Div col}} and the plainlist CSS class. == Usage == * Without any extra links: {{Lua sidebar}} * With an extra unbulleted list: {{Lua sidebar|{{ubl|List item 1|List item 2}}}} * For [[Template:Infobox]] and [[Module:Infobox]]: {{Lua sidebar|title=Infobox}} {{sandbox other|| }}

revision.comment: ce
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template displays links which are generated based on a page's base page name. These are useful for templates which work using a Lua module of the same name. The parameter {{para|title}} can be used to add the title of the template and module, if needed. The first unnamed parameter or {{para|1}} can be used to add more information; {{tlx|Sidebar|2=child=yes}} can be used inside it for further customization. The default links use {{tl|Div col}} and the plainlist CSS class. == Usage == * Without any extra links: {{Lua sidebar}} * With an extra unbulleted list: {{Lua sidebar|{{ubl|List item 1|List item 2}}}} * For [[Template:Infobox]] and [[Module:Infobox]]: {{Lua sidebar|title=Infobox}} {{sandbox other|| }}

{{Documentation subpage}} This template displays links which are generated based on a page's base page name. These are useful for templates which work using a Lua module of the same name. The parameter {{para|title}} can be used to add the title of the template and module, if needed; {{para|template}} and {{para|module}} do the same, but for only the template and only the module respectively. The first unnamed parameter or {{para|1}} can be used to add more information; {{tlx|Sidebar|2=child=yes}} can be used inside it for further customization. The default links use {{tl|Div col}} and the plainlist CSS class. == Usage == * Without any extra links: {{Lua sidebar}} * With an extra unbulleted list: {{Lua sidebar|{{ubl|List item 1|List item 2}}}} * For [[Template:Infobox]] and [[Module:Infobox]]: {{Lua sidebar|title=Infobox}} * For [[Template:Coord]], on [[Module talk:Coordinates]]: {{Lua sidebar|template=Coord}} * For [[Module:Coordinates]], on [[Template talk:Coord]]: {{Lua sidebar|module=Coordinates}} {{sandbox other|| }}

revision.comment: ce
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template displays links which are generated based on a page's base page name. These are useful for templates which work using a specific Lua module. The parameter {{para|title}} can be used to add the title of the template and module, if needed; {{para|template}} and {{para|module}} do the same, but for only the template and only the module respectively. The first unnamed parameter or {{para|1}} can be used to add more information; {{tlx|Sidebar|2=child=yes}} can be used inside it for further customization. The default links use {{tl|Div col}} and the plainlist CSS class. == Usage == * Without any extra links: {{Lua sidebar}} * With an extra unbulleted list: {{Lua sidebar|{{ubl|List item 1|List item 2}}}} * For [[Template:Infobox]] and [[Module:Infobox]]: {{Lua sidebar|title=Infobox}} * For [[Template:Coord]], on [[Module talk:Coordinates]]: {{Lua sidebar|template=Coord}} * For [[Module:Coordinates]], on [[Template talk:Coord]]: {{Lua sidebar|module=Coordinates}} {{sandbox other|| }}

revision.comment: Mismatched formatting repaired
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template displays links which are generated based on a page's base page name. These are useful for templates which work using a specific Lua module. The parameter {{para|title}} can be used to add the title of the template and module, if needed; {{para|template}} and {{para|module}} do the same, but for only the template and only the module respectively. The first unnamed parameter or {{para|1}} can be used to add more information; {{tlx|Sidebar|2=child=yes}} can be used inside it for further customization. The default links use {{tl|Div col}} and the plainlist CSS class. == Usage == * Without any extra links: {{Lua sidebar}} * With an extra unbulleted list: {{Lua sidebar|{{ubl|List item 1|List item 2}}}} * For [[Template:Infobox]] and [[Module:Infobox]]: {{Lua sidebar|title=Infobox}} * For [[Template:Coord]], on [[Module talk:Coordinates]]: {{Lua sidebar|template=Coord}} * For [[Module:Coordinates]], on [[Template talk:Coord]]: {{Lua sidebar|module=Coordinates}} {{sandbox other|| }}

revision.comment: add uses tstyles
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Lua sidebar/styles.css}} This template displays links which are generated based on a page's base page name. These are useful for templates which work using a specific Lua module. The parameter {{para|title}} can be used to add the title of the template and module, if needed; {{para|template}} and {{para|module}} do the same, but for only the template and only the module respectively. The first unnamed parameter or {{para|1}} can be used to add more information; {{tlx|Sidebar|2=child=yes}} can be used inside it for further customization. The default links use {{tl|Div col}} and the plainlist CSS class. == Usage == * Without any extra links: {{Lua sidebar}} * With an extra unbulleted list: {{Lua sidebar|{{ubl|List item 1|List item 2}}}} * For [[Template:Infobox]] and [[Module:Infobox]]: {{Lua sidebar|title=Infobox}} * For [[Template:Coord]], on [[Module talk:Coordinates]]: {{Lua sidebar|template=Coord}} * For [[Module:Coordinates]], on [[Template talk:Coord]]: {{Lua sidebar|module=Coordinates}} {{sandbox other|| }}

revision.comment: no div col
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Lua sidebar/styles.css}} This template displays links which are generated based on a page's base page name. These are useful for templates which work using a specific Lua module. The parameter {{para|title}} can be used to add the title of the template and module, if needed; {{para|template}} and {{para|module}} do the same, but for only the template and only the module respectively. The first unnamed parameter or {{para|1}} can be used to add more information; {{tlx|Sidebar|2=child=yes}} can be used inside it for further customization. The default links use {{tl|plainlinks}}. == Usage == * Without any extra links: {{Lua sidebar}} * With an extra unbulleted list: {{Lua sidebar|{{ubl|List item 1|List item 2}}}} * For [[Template:Infobox]] and [[Module:Infobox]]: {{Lua sidebar|title=Infobox}} * For [[Template:Coord]], on [[Module talk:Coordinates]]: {{Lua sidebar|template=Coord}} * For [[Module:Coordinates]], on [[Template talk:Coord]]: {{Lua sidebar|module=Coordinates}} {{sandbox other|| }}

revision.comment: [[Module:Redirect]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Redirect}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Lua sidebar/styles.css}} This template displays links which are generated based on a page's base page name. These are useful for templates which work using a specific Lua module. The parameter {{para|title}} can be used to add the title of the template and module, if needed; {{para|template}} and {{para|module}} do the same, but for only the template and only the module respectively. The first unnamed parameter or {{para|1}} can be used to add more information; {{tlx|Sidebar|2=child=yes}} can be used inside it for further customization. The default links use {{tl|plainlinks}}. == Usage == * Without any extra links: {{Lua sidebar}} * With an extra unbulleted list: {{Lua sidebar|{{ubl|List item 1|List item 2}}}} * For [[Template:Infobox]] and [[Module:Infobox]]: {{Lua sidebar|title=Infobox}} * For [[Template:Coord]], on [[Module talk:Coordinates]]: {{Lua sidebar|template=Coord}} * For [[Module:Coordinates]], on [[Template talk:Coord]]: {{Lua sidebar|module=Coordinates}} {{sandbox other|| }}

revision.comment: Add Template:uncategorized. All templates should be in at least one category.
Category:Wikipedia Lua-related templates
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Redirect}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Lua sidebar/styles.css}} This template displays links which are generated based on a page's base page name. These are useful for templates which work using a specific Lua module. The parameter {{para|title}} can be used to add the title of the template and module, if needed; {{para|template}} and {{para|module}} do the same, but for only the template and only the module respectively. The first unnamed parameter or {{para|1}} can be used to add more information; {{tlx|Sidebar|2=child=yes}} can be used inside it for further customization. The default links use {{tl|plainlinks}}. == Usage == * Without any extra links: {{Lua sidebar}} * With an extra unbulleted list: {{Lua sidebar|{{ubl|List item 1|List item 2}}}} * For [[Template:Infobox]] and [[Module:Infobox]]: {{Lua sidebar|title=Infobox}} * For [[Template:Coord]], on [[Module talk:Coordinates]]: {{Lua sidebar|template=Coord}} * For [[Module:Coordinates]], on [[Template talk:Coord]]: {{Lua sidebar|module=Coordinates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia Lua-related templates]] }}
